secrets.description: The single wallet address that receives every app transaction (campaign creates, contributions). All on-chain state is reconstructed by polling transactions sent to this address.
The public key of the server-side wallet used to send withdraw and refund transactions back to users. Can be the same as APP_PUBKEY.
The private signing key (wallet seed) for SENDER_APP_PUBKEY. Used by the server to sign withdraw/refund transactions.
Chain ID for the Usernode block explorer (e.g. 1 for mainnet). Used by the poller to look up transactions.
